title: Balancing Builder Bot
description: A two-wheeled self-balancing robot made for the e-Yantra competition. It uses IMU for state estimation and LQR for stabilization. We secured 4th position internationally.

title: Maze Solver Bot
description: An FPGA-based autonomous robot that solves a maze. I designed the chassis in Fusion 360, made the PCB in KiCAD, and wrote the logic for the DE0-Nano FPGA.

title: Posture Pro Belt
description: A portable posture correction belt with vibration alerts and massage. Won the Best Innovation Award at the MEDHA 2024 hackathon for the hardware design and prototyping.

title: Fastest Line Follower
description: A high-speed robot built using an STM32 microcontroller and QTRX sensors. I wrote the PID tracking code and the embedded control stack to make it navigate fast.
